news.headline: TransUnion reports Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results in Chicago, announces refreshed capital allocation framework.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Chicago, TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) revealed its financial results for the quarter and full-year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company shared important numbers for investors and stakeholders, showcasing its performance during the specified period. This information was made public without specifying the source of the data.

news.headline: Avient's Q4 sales rose 4% to $747M, full-year sales up 3% to $3,240M. Organic sales grew 5% in Q4 and 4% for the year.
news.summary: Sales in the fourth quarter rose by 4% to $747 million, while full-year sales increased by 3% to $3,240 million. Organic sales, which do not account for foreign exchange effects, saw a 5% growth in the fourth quarter and a 4% growth for the entire year. Positive growth was observed in all regions, contributing to the increase in organic sales.

news.headline: Epson's Lauren Lung named 2025 Channel Chief by CRN for commercial sales, enhancing vendor recognition.
news.summary: Epson America, Inc. from Los Alamitos, California revealed on February 13, 2025, that Lauren Lung, the director of commercial sales, has been chosen to be part of the prestigious 2025 Channel Chiefs list by CRN®, a subdivision of The Channel Company. This annual recognition highlights top performers in the IT channel vendor sector.

news.headline: G2 Goldfields Inc. forms new exploration alliances in Guyana, acquiring properties with 7.8M+ ounces of gold.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 13, 2025, G2 Goldfields Inc. revealed its agreements to purchase two promising property packages in Region 7, Guyana, boosting its existing regional targets. The Oko-Aremu site holds top-tier gold reserves, surpassing 7.8 million ounces in total. The company plans to release a new mineral resource estimate (MRE) soon and is actively drilling the high-grade mineralization corridors to the north. G2, also known as "G2," trades on the TSX as GTWO and on the OTCQX as GUYGF.

news.headline: Altus Group reports Q4 2024 Pan-European dataset showing real estate markets in Europe entering recovery phase.
news.summary: New information from Altus Group's Pan-European valuation dataset indicates that certain areas in Europe's real estate markets are now transitioning towards a phase of recovery.

news.headline: MT Højgaard Holding A/S annual report FY 2024 released on 20 Feb 2025 with conference call at 10.00 CET, no registration needed.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, MT Højgaard Holding will unveil its 2024 annual report. A conference call will be held at 10:00 (CET) on that day for the management to discuss the results and future prospects, followed by a Q&A session. No registration is necessary for participation.

news.headline: RO仙境傳說 officially launched in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau on Feb 13, 2025, by Gravity.
news.summary: On Feb. 13, 2025, Seoul-based GRAVITY Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY), known for online and mobile game development, revealed that its subsidiary Gravity Communications Co., Ltd. introduced Ragnarok Begins (RO 仙境傳說：一定要可愛), an Action Side-scrolling MMORPG game, in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau. The release occurred at 9:00 p.m. local time in Taiwan.

news.headline: Zymeworks to report Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 5, 2025, followed by conference call at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: Zymeworks Inc., a clinical-stage biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq as ZYME, located in Vancouver, British Columbia, is focused on developing innovative biotherapeutics for challenging diseases like cancer, inflammation, and autoimmune disorders. The company has revealed that it will disclose its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 5, 2025, after the market closes. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for the same day at 4:30 pm Eastern Time (ET) to discuss the financial outcomes and provide a corporate update. This announcement is set to bring important insights into the company's performance and future prospects.

news.headline: Vistin Pharma ASA plans to propose a cash dividend of NOK 1.25 per share for 2024, to be decided on May 22, 2025 AGM.
news.summary: Vistin Pharma ASA's Board of Directors intends to recommend a cash dividend of NOK 1.25 per share for the 2024 accounting year. The shareholders will vote on this proposal during the Annual General Meeting scheduled for May 22, 2025. If approved, the dividend will be disbursed in June of the same year.

news.headline: Ormat Technologies secures tolling agreements for two energy storage facilities in Israel, boosting stability and profitability.
news.summary: Ormat has recently secured new tolling agreements that mark a significant step in its strategic transition towards a more stable and profitable portfolio. These agreements are crucial as they ensure a solid revenue stream for the company. The move is aimed at enhancing the financial stability and long-term growth prospects of Ormat. This strategic shift is expected to generate approximately [insert number] in additional revenue for the company annually. Through these agreements, Ormat is reshaping its portfolio to better position itself in the market and drive sustainable profitability.

news.headline: Genmab A/S to hold Annual General Meeting with key updates & reports, attended by 200 stakeholders.
MBT showcases sustainable innovations at AHR 2025 in Orlando, with 20+ years of industry experience and advanced technology.
news.summary: Midea Building Technologies (MBT) recently highlighted its dedication to technology and sustainability at AHR 2025 in Orlando. The event featured a range of cutting-edge products and dependable solutions by MBT. By participating in this significant global HVAC exhibition, Midea demonstrated its advanced technology aimed at enhancing product reliability, efficiency, and overall comfort. With over two decades of experience in the industry since its inception in 1999, MBT has solidified its reputation as a leader in providing efficient commercial HVAC solutions.

news.headline: Beneficient (NASDAQ: BENF) released Q3 fiscal 2025 results, ending Dec 31, 2024. Key financial numbers disclosed.
news.summary: Beneficient (NASDAQ: BENF) announced its fiscal 2025 third-quarter financial results for the period ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: AI company increases DeepSeek-R1 deployment with improved serverless APIs & reasoning clusters for faster, scalable solutions.
news.summary: Together AI has improved the DeepSeek-R1 deployment by introducing new serverless APIs and reasoning clusters. This development aims to provide rapid and scalable solutions for large reasoning model applications. The enhancements are designed to offer high-speed performance and scalability for handling extensive reasoning tasks efficiently.

news.headline: OneConnect integrates DeepSeek into AI Agent Platform for financial institutions, launched on Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: Earlier today in Shanghai, on February 13, 2025, OneConnect Financial Technology Co., Ltd unveiled its innovative AI Agent Platform. The Company, listed on NYSE under the symbol OCFT and on HKSE under the symbol 6638, specializes in providing business technology services tailored for financial institutions. Their new platform incorporates state-of-the-art open-source technologies for enhanced efficiency and effectiveness.

news.headline: Biz2Credit report shows SMB average earnings fell by $10k in Jan 2025 to $32,300, while expenses rose to $725,800.
news.summary: Biz2Credit's Small Business Earnings Report for January 2025 indicated that monthly earnings averaged at $32,300, marking the lowest level in the past 36 months analyzed. Despite an increase in average monthly revenues to $758,100, expenses also rose to $725,800 - the highest since January 2022. Biz2Credit CEO Rohit Arora highlighted the challenge for small businesses with expenses outpacing revenues, especially during tough months like January, known for reduced consumer spending post-holidays. The report also noted a 3% inflation rate in January, leaving small businesses with uncertainties about future profitability.

news.headline: PG&E Corporation met earnings and financial targets in 2024 with $1.15/share compared to $1.05 in 2023. Operating cash flow increased to $8 billion in 2024.2025 GAAP EPS guidance reaffirmed at $1.30 to $1.36/share. Non-GAAP core EPS increased to range $1.48 to $1.52/share. O&M costs reduced by 4%, saving $200M each year. Achieved targets for safety and energy delivery in 2024. Targeting 20% dividend payout ratio by 2028. Stats in response.
news.summary: In 2024, PG&E Corporation maintained solid financial performance, with GAAP earnings of $0.30 per share for Q4, compared to $0.43 in 2023, and $1.15 per share for the full year, up from $1.05 in 2023. Non-GAAP core earnings were $0.31 per share for Q4 and $1.36 per share for the full year, showing growth from the previous year. Equity needs were met to fund a $63 billion capital plan through 2028. 2025 guidance includes GAAP EPS of $1.30 to $1.36 and non-GAAP core EPS of $1.48 to $1.52. Operational strides included zero major wildfires caused by their equipment, cost savings in O&M, connecting more customers to the grid, and achieving energy bill stability. The company is focused on clean energy accessibility for all. The 2024 financial results highlighted an income available for common shareholders of $2,475 million. Non-GAAP core earnings were $1.36 per share for 2024. PG&E aims for ongoing growth while prioritizing safety and sustainable energy delivery.

news.headline: IDEAYA Biosciences reports strong financial results; 230+ patients in MUM trial, targeting PFS readout by 2025; 95 in UM trial for H1 2025 update.
news.summary: More than 230 patients have been recruited to participate in a potential registration-enabling trial for first-line (1L) HLA-A2-negative metastatic uveal melanoma (MUM). The target is to achieve a median progression-free survival (PFS) readout by the end of 2025. Additionally, 95 patients have been enrolled in a neoadjuvant trial for uveal melanoma, with plans to release clinical data and regulatory updates in the first half of 2025. This includes the evaluation of vision data related to the treatment in plaque.

news.headline: PG&E Corporation meets guidance for 2024 earnings, with GAAP earnings at $0.30 per share in Q4, down from $0.43 in 2023.
news.summary: In Oakland, California, as of February 13, 2025, PG&E Corporation (NYSE: PCG) reported strong financial performance for 2024, surpassing expectations. In the fourth quarter of 2024, they posted GAAP earnings of $0.30 per share, a decrease from the $0.43 per share earnings in the same quarter of 2023. The company is poised to exceed these numbers in the coming quarters.

news.headline: China's Middle East envoy and EU official hold a phone call.
Walker & Dunlop's Q4 2024 results show a 42% rise in net income and EPS, signaling a robust end to the year.
news.summary: Real estate financing company Walker & Dunlop, headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland, has released its financial report for the fourth quarter of 2024. The report indicates a significant growth with a 42% increase in net income. The company's earnings per share (EPS) also saw a notable increase, showcasing a strong finish to the year 2024. These positive results reflect the company's financial health and performance during the mentioned period.

news.headline: RF Investment Partners acquires S&K Building Services, expanding its essential services portfolio in the commercial property sector.
news.summary: A renowned growth capital investor, RF Investment Partners, has recently acquired S&K Building Services, a company offering window washing, pressure washing, and metal/glass restoration services to multi-story commercial properties. This acquisition expands RF's portfolio in the essential services sector, aligning with the company's key investment strategies. S&K, headquartered in Indianapolis, IN, operates through various strategically positioned branches.

news.headline: WEL Networks chooses IFS's AIP platform Copperleaf to improve asset investment planning. Zealand-based company innovates with energy solutions.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 13, 2025, IFS, a top enterprise cloud and Industrial AI software provider, revealed that WEL Networks, a key player in innovative and sustainable energy solutions and electricity distribution services in New Zealand, has chosen their services.

news.headline: Verona Pharma to reveal Q4 2024 results on Feb 27, 2025, with a conference call at 9:00 a.m. EST / 2:00 p.m. GMT.
news.summary: Verona Pharma plc (NASDAQ:VRNA) will release its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 on February 27, 2025. An investment community conference call will be held at 9:00 a.m. EST / 2:00 p.m. GMT on the same day to discuss these results and offer a corporate update. To join the call, dial +1-800-836-8184 (U.S. callers) or +1-646-357-8785 (international callers). A live webcast will be accessible on the Investors page of www.veronapharma.com, with an audio replay accessible for 90 days. For more information, contact Verona Pharma plc.

news.headline: Mullen Group Ltd. announced 2024 Q4 financial results with revenue of $499.1M, OIBDA of $85.0M, net income of $18.9M. Uncertain 2025 outlook noted.
news.summary: Mullen Group Ltd., a logistics provider in Canada, reported financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. Revenue for the year was $1,989.3 million, slightly down from the previous year. Operating income before depreciation and amortization was $332.2 million, a 1.2% increase. Net income was $112.3 million, down 17.8%. Adjusted net income was $119.6 million, a decrease of 11%. Earnings per share were $1.28, down 15.8%. Cash dividends declared per common share were $0.77, up 6.9%. In Q4, revenue was $499.1 million, operating income before depreciation and amortization was $85.0 million, and net income was $18.9 million. The company expressed concerns about the Canadian economy and trade disruptions with the U.S., expecting continued soft demand for freight services in 2025. Acquisition opportunities are being monitored, but only those adding value to shareholders will be pursued. Overall, the company's strong balance sheet and diversified portfolio are seen as advantages in uncertain times.

news.headline: LXP Industrial Trust reported Q4 2024 net income of $31.4 million, Adjusted Company FFO of $47.0 million, and increased Same-Store NOI by 4.1%. They completed 1 million sq ft of new leases, acquired 4 warehouse facilities for $157.6M, and invested $21.0M in development activities. They also disposed of properties for $251.8 million in 2024. Total consolidated debt was $1.6B, and Q4 2024 revenues were $100.9 million compared to $83.0 million in Q4 2023. Guidance for 2025 shows net income ranging from $0.01 to $0.05 per diluted common share and Adjusted Company FFO of $0.61 to $0.65 per diluted common share.
news.summary: LXP Industrial Trust reported their financial results for the quarter and year ending December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter of 2024, they recorded a net income of $31.4 million with Adjusted Company FFO of $47.0 million. They increased their Same-Store NOI by 4.1% compared to the same period in 2023. During the full year 2024, they had a Net Income of $37.9 million and Adjusted Company FFO of $189.4 million. They completed 4.5 million square feet of new leases and lease extensions, with Base and Cash Base rents increasing by 46.5% and 39.7% respectively. Additionally, they acquired four warehouse facilities for $157.6 million and disposed of three warehouse facilities for $136.7 million. LXP ended the year with a net debt to Adjusted EBITDA ratio of 5.9x. They also provided their 2025 earnings guidance with net income estimated to be in the range of $0.01 to $0.05 per diluted common share and Adjusted Company FFO between $0.61 to $0.65 per diluted common share. LXP will host a conference call on February 13, 2025 to discuss these results further.

news.headline: Keyera Corp. announced fourth quarter & year-end 2024 financial results. Adjusted EBITDA at $313M in Q4 and $1.28B annually. DCF at $168M in Q4 and $771M annually. Net earnings at $89M in Q4 and $487M annually. Fee-for-service realized margin at $970M. AEF outage for maintenance expected to impact 2025 margin by $40M. Annual growth capital spending at $116M. Marketing segment realized margin annual record at $485M. Growth target set at 7-8% annually for 2024-2027.
news.summary: Keyera Corp announced its fourth quarter and year-end 2024 financial results, highlighting adjusted EBITDA of $313 million for the quarter and $1.28 billion for the year, with net earnings of $89 million for the quarter and $487 million for the year. The Fee-for-Service Realized Margin hit a record annual $970 million, with the Liquids Infrastructure segment achieving record quarterly realized margin of $153 million and annual margin of $558 million. Marketing segment delivered a record annual realized margin of $485 million. Keyera ended the year with net debt to adjusted EBITDA of 2.0 times. Growth capital expenditures for 2025 are expected to range between $300-$330 million. The company announced a new 7-8% annual growth target for fee-based adjusted EBITDA over 2024-2027. Key measures included distributable cash flow of $770.914 million for the year and net earnings per share of $2.12 for 2024.

news.headline: BKV partners with leading midstream operator to build CCS facility at South Texas plant, aiming to reduce emissions.
news.summary: In Denver, BKV Corporation (NYSE: BKV) revealed a key collaboration with a prominent diversified midstream energy firm to establish a cutting-edge carbon capture and sequestration (CCS) facility at an active natural gas facility in South Texas. This initiative signifies BKV's dedication to diminishing its emission impact by forging profitable CCS ventures. The partnership lays the groundwork for potential joint endeavors on upcoming projects between the two companies.

news.headline: Bloomberg reports on performance of materials sector and industry. Check it out for the latest updates.
Genesis Energy, L.P. reports Q4 2024 results with a net loss of $49.4 million, down from $12.0 million in 2023. Operating cash flows at $74.0 million, lower than $124.8 million previously.
news.summary: Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) has reported its fourth quarter results, revealing a Net Loss Attributable to the company of $49.4 million in 2024, a significant drop from the Net Income of $12.0 million in the same period in 2023. Additionally, Cash Flows from Operating Activities were $74.0 million in the fourth quarter of 2024, decreased from $124.8 million in the previous year. These financial figures indicate a challenging year for Genesis Energy, L.P.

news.headline: Gogoro releases Q4 2024 financials: Revenue $73M (down 20.2%), battery service revenue grows 10.2%, net loss $71.8M compared to $26.7M in Q4 2023, adjusted EBITDA $8.8M in Q4. Plans for cost reduction and efficiency in 2024-2025 aimed at reaching profitability. 2024 revenue $310.5M (down 11.2%), full-year net loss $123.2M vs. $76M 2023, full-year adjusted EBITDA $46.5M. Forecasting full-year 2025 revenue between $295M to $315M. Non-IFRS gross margin for 2024 at 2.4%. Conference call scheduled for further discussion.
news.summary: Gogoro Inc., a global technology leader in battery swapping ecosystems, released its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. In Q4, revenue was $73.0 million (down 20.2% YoY), with battery swapping service revenue at $35.9 million (up 10.2% YoY). For the full year, revenue was $310.5 million (down 11.2% YoY) with battery swapping service revenue at $137.9 million (up 4.6% YoY). The gross margin for Q4 was (8.1%) due to battery pack upgrades, with a net loss of $71.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $8.8 million in Q4, down slightly from the previous year. Gogoro plans to reach profitability by 2026 in its battery swapping business and 2028 in hardware sales. They anticipate 2025 revenue between $295 million to $315 million, with non-IFRS gross margin expected to remain consistent. Gogoro will hold an earnings webcast on February 13, 2025, to discuss the results and outlook.

news.headline: Vecima Networks Inc. (TSX: VCM) releases Q2 Fiscal 2025 financial results in Victoria, British Columbia.
news.summary: In Victoria, British Columbia, Vecima Networks Inc. (TSX: VCM) announced its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2025.

news.headline: Ohmium opens Rapid Response Service Center in Abu Dhabi to boost customer support. Hub will provide maintenance and refurbishment for UAE clients.
news.summary: Ohmium International, a prominent green hydrogen solutions provider, has unveiled a Rapid Response Service Center in Abu Dhabi, UAE, as part of its initiatives to bolster support for its expanding clientele. This facility will cater to maintenance and refurbishment needs for customers in the UAE, showcasing the company's commitment to enhancing operational efficiency and customer satisfaction. This move signifies a strategic investment by Ohmium to enhance its localized service offerings, as it aims to strengthen its position in the market and meet the needs of its current and prospective clients.

news.headline: ACI Worldwide (NASDAQ: ACIW) will report Q4 & 2024 results on Feb 27, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time.
news.summary: ACI Worldwide (NASDAQ: ACIW), a leading global payments technology company, will release its financial results for Q4 and full-year 2024 on Thursday, February 27, 2025. A conference call will be hosted by management at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to discuss these results. Interested individuals can join the real-time teleconference webcast at http://investor.aciworldwide.com/ or dial in using the provided toll-free number.

news.headline: Strong full-year and Q4 2024 results for Canadian Tire Corporation with Q4 diluted EPS at $7.37. Sales up 1.1% in Q4. Loyalty sales up 4%. Full-year Diluted EPS at $15.92, Normalized Diluted EPS up 21.7% to $12.62. Retail segment IBT was $772.2 million up from $407.0 million in the prior year. Consolidated IBT reached $1,246.0 million. Total capital expenditures in 2024 were $575.1 million. Dividend declared at $1.775 payable on June 1, 2025. Share repurchases of up to $200 million planned. Operating capital expenditures for 2025 expected to be $525 million to $575 million. Total Operating Capital Expenditures since 2022 amounted to $1.8 billion. A deepened connection between retail banners and loyalty system drove higher member engagement and sales. CTC is modernizing core retail elements and strengthening digital capabilities which contributed to an enhanced customer experience. Total capital expenditures were $575.1 million in 2024. Share repurchases of Class A Non-Voting Shares are planned up to $200 million. Further details can be found at Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Canadian Tire Corporation reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 28, 2024. In Q4, Diluted Earnings Per Share (EPS) was $7.37, with Q4 Normalized Diluted EPS up 20.4% to $4.07. Full-year Diluted EPS was $15.92, and Full-Year Normalized Diluted EPS was up 21.7% to $12.62. Consolidated comparable sales and retail sales increased by 1.1% in Q4, with strong performance from Canadian Tire Retail, SportChek, and Mark's. Total capital expenditures in 2024 were $575.1 million, and the Company announced repurchase plans of up to $200 million of its shares in 2025. Canadian Tire highlighted its Better Connected strategy, improving retail and loyalty sales growth, despite a challenging consumer demand environment.

news.headline: YETI reports Q4 & FY 2024 results as per GAAP & non-GAAP. Fiscal year ended Dec 28, 2024.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, YETI Holdings, Inc. (“YETI”) publicly shared its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year that concluded on December 28, 2024. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol YETI, released its financial data based on both generally accepted accounting principles in the United States of America (“GAAP”) and on a non-GAAP adjusted basis. For further details and a breakdown of GAAP to non-GAAP financial information, please refer to the sections on "Non-GAAP Financial Measures" and "Reconciliation of GAAP to Non-GAAP Financial Information" in the announcement.

news.headline: GiveMN to host Give OUT Day, LGBTQ+ national giving day; will amplify LGBTQ+ organizations, date 13th Feb 2025, from Minneapolis.
news.summary: A prominent fundraising organization in the community is set to enhance the influence of LGBTQ+ centered organizations nationwide. GiveMN, known for its dedication to fostering generosity and increasing donations, will continue the work of Give OUT Day. This initiative aims to raise funds and support for LGBTQ+ causes. Located in MINNEAPOLIS, as of Feb. 13, 2025, GiveMN is ready to build upon the success of past fundraising efforts to benefit LGBTQ+ organizations across the country.

news.headline: Construction drone market valued at $6.5 billion in 2023, set to reach $19 billion by 2032, growing at 12.4% CAGR. Technology advancements drive growth.
news.summary: The construction drone market is projected to grow significantly, from a value of $6.5 billion in 2023 to an estimated $19 billion by 2032, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.4% from 2024 to 2032. This growth is attributed to drones' improved features such as longer flight times, high-resolution cameras, and LiDAR technology, which enhance data collection accuracy and operational efficiency on construction sites. Integration with technologies like Building Information Modeling (BIM), Internet of Things (IoT), and Artificial Intelligence (AI) allows for better data analytics and monitoring. Drones also reduce the reliance on manual labor for tasks like surveying, resulting in significant cost savings for the industry.

news.headline: Hunt Scanlon Ventures advises TalentoHC in acquiring R2 Global; deal facilitated on Feb 13, 2025. #MandA #HumanCapital
news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut on February 13, 2025, Hunt Scanlon Ventures, a prominent M&A advisory firm specializing in human capital markets, revealed their role in overseeing a transaction between TalentoHC and R2 Global. Acting as a strategic advisor in the deal, Hunt Scanlon Ventures played a crucial role in facilitating this agreement. This successful collaboration highlights the expertise and capabilities of Hunt Scanlon Ventures in managing significant transactions within the industry.

news.headline: Eutectic Al-Si Alloy Market to reach US$ 899.3M by 2034, growing at 5.2% CAGR fueled by demand from automotive, aerospace industries.
news.summary: The Eutectic Aluminum-Silicon Alloy Market is estimated to be worth US$ 541.7 million in 2024 and is predicted to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.2% from 2024 to 2034. These alloys are in demand due to their lightweight properties and high strength, making them valuable for efficiency and performance in various industries. Specifically, the automotive industry is incorporating more aluminum components using eutectic Al-Si alloys in engine parts and structural components to enhance fuel efficiency and reduce vehicle weight. The aerospace and construction industries are also utilizing these alloys for their high-stress characteristics, temperature resistance, corrosion resistance, and aesthetics. The electronics sector is interested in the lightweight and thermally conductive properties of these materials. The market is expected to reach US$ 899.3 million by 2034 with a CAGR of 5.2%, indicating significant growth potential.

news.headline: VNET Group included in S&P Global Sustainability Yearbook 2025, recognized for sustainability efforts in China.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, VNET Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: VNET), a prominent internet data center services provider in China, revealed its inclusion in the S&P Global Sustainability Yearbook 2025. This recognition signifies VNET's commitment to sustainability practices. The company's achievement highlights its dedication to environmental and social responsibility, making it a key player in promoting sustainable development.

news.headline: IDEAYA collabs with Gilead to evaluate IDE397 & Trodelvy in MTAP-deletion NSCLC, aiming for first-in-class treatment.
news.summary: IDEAYA has recently expanded its partnership with Gilead by entering a new clinical study collaboration and supply agreement. This agreement will involve the evaluation of IDE397, IDEAYA's MAT2A inhibitor, in combination with Trodelvy, Gilead's Trop-2 directed ADC, in patients with MTAP-deletion non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). This collaboration aims to explore the potential of IDE397 and Trodelvy as a first-in-class clinical combination.

news.headline: Way.com's Recapture Program simplifies auto loan refinancing for credit union members, revolutionizing savings with ease.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Fremont, California, Way.com introduced the Recapture Program alongside its traditional refinance program. This innovative initiative aims to simplify the process of saving on auto loans for credit union members. Unlike conventional refinance programs, the Recapture Program eliminates the need for extensive paperwork and simplifies the refinancing process...

news.headline: Toys for Tots promotes kindness year-round for disadvantaged kids, not just in February. Marine Toys for Tots aims to spread kindness without monthly boundaries, emphasizing year-round support for children in need.
news.summary: In Triangle, Virginia on February 13, 2025, Marine Toys for Tots highlighted that despite February being known for "National Random Acts of Kindness" month, kindness should not be limited to just one month. The organization's year-round mission reflects this belief in continuous generosity with its "Not So..." initiative.

news.headline: DATAcc by DiMe releases resources for developing digital health tech to predict/manage cancer immunotherapy side effects like Cytokine Release Syndrome. Boston, Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: Today in Boston, on Feb. 13, 2025, the Digital Health Measurement Collaborative Community (DATAcc) by the Digital Medicine organization launched new resources. These resources aim to assist developers and researchers in creating de-risking digital products that can enhance the prediction and management of Cytokine Release Syndrome. This initiative seeks to provide support in a critical area, with the goal of improving outcomes related to this syndrome. The launch signals a step forward in addressing the challenge, potentially benefiting numerous individuals.

news.headline: Namibox, Tencent, and SCEP partner to develop AI-driven learning solutions. Company (Nasdaq: NAMI) announced the collaboration.
news.summary: Today in Shanghai, on February 13, 2025, Jinxin Technology Holding Company (listed as Nasdaq: NAMI) disclosed a significant collaboration with Tencent Cloud and Sichuan Education Press (SCEP). Jinxin Technology Holding Company, known for its digital-content offerings in China, has joined hands with Tencent Cloud and SCEP for an extensive strategic partnership.

news.headline: West announces 2024 results, conference call at 9 a.m. today. (NYSE: WST) introduced 2025 financial guidance.
news.summary: A conference call has been scheduled for 9 a.m. Eastern Time today to discuss the latest financial updates. Headquartered in Exton, Pennsylvania, West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST) revealed its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, in addition to introducing financial guidance for 2025. The company's latest performance highlights will be discussed in more detail during the call.

news.headline: High Tide opens 77th Canna Cabana store in Ontario, marking first location in Downtown Hamilton.
news.summary: High Tide Inc. has opened its initial store in Downtown Hamilton, marking its first presence in the area. The company, listed on the Nasdaq as HITI, the TSXV as HITI, and the FSE as 2LYA, specializes in retail and aims to provide substantial value to its customers. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it expands into a new market.

news.headline: Group 1 Automotive (NYSE: GPI) plans to host 2025 Analyst Day, with 258 dealerships in US and UK. CEO to lead event.
news.summary: In a press release dated February 13, 2025, Group 1 Automotive, Inc. (NYSE: GPI), a prominent automotive retailer ranked in the Fortune 250, revealed updates. The company, known for its vast network of 258 dealerships spanning the United States and the United Kingdom, shared that Daryl Kenningham, serving as the President and CEO of Group 1, will be leading the initiatives.

news.headline: SPY, the world's largest ETF, launched in 1993 with $630 billion AUM, has gained 1,273.15%, but BTCL is more impressive.
news.summary: With $630 billion in assets under management, the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE:SPY) is the world's largest and most popular exchange-traded fund. It was launched in January 1993, becoming the first ETF to list on U.S.-based exchanges. The ETF tracks the performance of the S&P 500 Index, consisting of all 500 companies in the index. Since its inception, the ETF shares have shown significant growth, increasing by approximately 1,273.15%. The debut year, however, was less eventful, with the ETF experiencing... (Read the full story on Benzinga.com).
